stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
If GEN 1 fails, can AC BUS 1 still be fed?

options.a: Yes, from AC BUS 2, provided contactors C2-2 and C2-1 are closed.
options.b: Yes, via the AC ESS BUS and contactor C3-1.
options.c: Yes, through DC BUS 1, contactor C5-1, and TRU 1.
options.d: No, AC BUS 1 can only be powered by GEN 1.
